zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Berry於1400年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可柏斯頓時，她的父親Edmund Berry31歲，母親Alice Gerbidge46歲。她於1418年3月24日與William Paston在英國諾福爾可柏斯頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1479年8月18日在她的家鄉享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Berry于1400年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可柏斯頓时，她的父亲Edmund Berry31岁，母亲Alice Gerbidge46岁。她于1418年3月24日与William Paston在英国諾福爾可柏斯頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1479年8月18日在她的家乡享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Berry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Barry
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Bery
meanings: Hungarian (Béry): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Bér, in Baranya, Komárom, Nógrád, Pest, Vas, or Zala counties.

variants.name: Beery
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Béara. See Berry and O'Berry .
Americanized form of Swiss German   Bieri  .

variants.name: Berrie
meanings: (Glasgow): from Middle English or Older Scots (atte) beri ‘(at the) manor house’, see Berry .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Berry was born in 1400, in Paston, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edmund Berry, was 31 and her mother, Alice Gerbidge, was 46. She married William Paston on 24 March 1418, in Paston, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 18 August 1479, in her hometown, at the age of 79, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Berry est née en 1400, à Paston, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund Berry, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice Gerbidge, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé William Paston le 24 mars 1418, à Paston, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 août 1479, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Berry 1400 in Paston, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Berry 31 und ihre Mutter Alice Gerbidge 46. Sie hat am 24. März 1418 in Paston, Norfolk, England William Paston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. August 1479 im Alter von 79 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato William Paston il 24 marzo 1418, nel Paston, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Berryが1400年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクプアストンで生まれた時，父Edmund Berryは31歳，母Alice Gerbidgeは46歳であった。1418年3月24日にイギリスノーフォルクプアストンでWilliam Pastonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1479年8月18日に故郷で79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Berry(이)가 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 파스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Berry(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Gerbidge(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1418년 3월 24일 영국 노르폴크 파스턴에서 William Paston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1479년 8월 18일 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Berry nasceu em 1400, em Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edmund Berry, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice Gerbidge, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com William Paston em 24 de março de 1418, em Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1479, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Berry родилась в 1400 г. в местности пастон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edmund Berry было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Gerbidge, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Paston 24 марта 1418 г. в местности пастон, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 18 августа 1479 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con William Paston el 24 de marzo de 1418, en Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1479, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
